author: Gazza
body: Sweet tunes dude! I love Nightmares!

author: Jessie
body:
I live in Pennsylvania, USA that is where Nathaniel Hoho is from… I saw him one time in a coffee shop and have been “following” him ever since. I love this blog because to really tell about his music. But until you see him live you haven’t heard anything! He is AMAZING live; you can tell that he loves his music and loves playing for people. He is one of the nicest people in a band I have ever met. He is not cocky like other bands that I have met are. When you said about “What’s on your mind” and the chemistry between Nathaniel and Rachel it is sooo true! My friend and I have decided they are the Sonny and Cher of our time but with a good ending! Both are amazing people who deserve great things. I can’t wait for him to make it big, but first I need to get this autograph so that I can say I knew him before he got big!!

Thanks for the awesome article about an amazing artist!  
\-Jessie

author: admin
body:
@ Gazza:  
Thanks for stopping by guy. Glad you like the sounds!  
@ Jessie:  
Thanks very much! Yeah, I have no doubt that seeing Nathaniel live would be something else… you can tell his enjoyment of the music from the recorded stuff, so I can only imagine how that comes across live.

Thanks for stopping by and dropping a great comment!

author: Jenna
body: I am so glad that Nathaniel is continuing to get so much attention. I am from central PA just minutes from where he grew up and have hung out with him a few times, although I’m sure he doesn’t remember me! I’ve since moved away but continue to follow him and his music and always look forward to new music to be posted on MySpace… those songs really do stay in your mind and end up on your playlist over and over again.

author: admin
body:
Hi Jenna,  
Thanks for dropping in! Glad to see we agree on the “playlist attraction factor” of Nathaniel’s songs :P

author: Matt Bubb
body:
i’ve known nathaniel for a couple years now. i hail from pennsylvania as well but live out here in california now…anyway he came on his road trip to cali and i gave him a place to stay the night one weekend…we went to the beach and met a homeless guy…homeless joe…haha…sorry inside joke…anyway…if its any indication of what the people in cali and back home in pennsylvania think of “Nathaniel Hohol and the Click Clack Boom” he will go far… there is so much much musical talent from central pennsylvania…Nathaniel, Billy Newman (the bassist), Grant Wilson (the drummer), Will Markley (another killer musician who plays live on occasion with the others)…they are all great….download there music…call ur radio stations and get these guys some exposure!!!! you kno u want to!!! and watch some of the videos on youtube.com of nathaniel’s live shows..ull be amazed!!….peace.love.happiness.

\-bubb-
